# `movexplR6`

The goal of `movexplR6` is to demonstrate using [`R6`
objects](https://r6.r-lib.org/index.html) in [Shiny
app-packages](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/shiny-app-pkgs/).

## Installation

You can install the development version of `movexplR6` from
[GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r

# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("mjfrigaard/movexplR6")
```

Check the documentation for more information.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`MovieData`](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/movexplR6/reference/MovieData.md)
  : MovieData R6 class
- [`axis_vars`](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/movexplR6/reference/axis_vars.md)
  : Axis variable options for the movie explorer scatter plot
- [`launch_app()`](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/movexplR6/reference/launch_app.md)
  : Launch the Movie Explorer application
- [`mod_filters_server()`](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/movexplR6/reference/mod_filters_server.md)
  : Filter inputs module server
- [`mod_filters_ui()`](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/movexplR6/reference/mod_filters_ui.md)
  : Filter inputs module UI
- [`mod_plot_server()`](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/movexplR6/reference/mod_plot_server.md)
  : Scatter plot display module server
- [`mod_plot_ui()`](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/movexplR6/reference/mod_plot_ui.md)
  : Scatter plot display module UI
- [`movies_server()`](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/movexplR6/reference/movies_server.md)
  : Main server logic for the Movie Explorer application
- [`movies_ui()`](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/movexplR6/reference/movies_ui.md)
  : Main UI for the Movie Explorer application
